Usage
=====

Installation 
------------
.. code-block:: console

    git clone https://github.com/pcb1631/PYP
    
Or download the zip file from the GitHub repository and extract it TO ONE FOLDER AS-IS.

Running the project
-------------------
.. code-block:: console

    python main.py
    python ./PYP/main.py
    
Or double click on main.py on Windows
